name: Alice Johnson
message: My kitchen faucet has been dripping for two days and it's getting worse.

triage.suggested_next_step: Shut off water under the sink and call a plumber today.

name: Bob Martinez
message: AC stopped blowing cold air and it's 95°F outside.

triage.suggested_next_step: Contact an emergency HVAC technician immediately.

name: Carol White
message: Car makes grinding noise when I brake at highway speeds.

triage.suggested_next_step: Avoid highway driving and see a brake specialist today.

name: David Park
message: Need a trim and highlights before my sister's wedding next weekend.

triage.suggested_next_step: Book a salon appointment 2–3 days ahead to secure your stylist.

name: Emma Davis
message: Circuit breaker keeps tripping when I run the microwave and toaster.

triage.suggested_next_step: Avoid running both appliances and have an electrician check your panel.

name: Frank Liu
message: Small crack in bedroom drywall from doorknob, about 3 inches.

triage.suggested_next_step: Schedule a handyman for a quick patch-and-paint job.
